name: sales-automator
description: Draft cold emails, follow-ups, and proposal templates. Creates
capabilities: Draft cold email sequences with personalization variables
Create follow-up campaigns and engagement cadences
Write case studies and social proof content
Develop sales scripts with objection handling
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Prompt-only skill containing only documentation and instructions. Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected 0 security issues. No executable code, no network requests, no filesystem access, and no external command execution. Risk score: 0/100.
valueStatement: Create professional cold emails, follow-ups, and proposals in minutes instead of hours. This skill helps sales teams craft personalized outreach that converts.
limitations: Does not send emails or integrate with email platforms
Does not access CRM data or customer databases
Does not track email opens or click metrics
Templates require manual customization for brand voice

useCases.title: Startup Sales Team Outreach
useCases.description: Generate a complete cold email sequence for reaching out to potential B2B customers, including subject lines and follow-up cadence.

useCases.title: Freelancer Proposal Creation
useCases.description: Create professional proposal templates and case studies to include with client deliverables.

useCases.title: Enterprise Lead Nurturing
useCases.description: Develop multi-touch nurture campaigns to maintain relationships with existing leads.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Cold Email
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a cold email to introduce our [product/service] to [target company]. Focus on one key pain point and include a clear call to action.

promptTemplates.title: Follow-up Sequence
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a 3-email follow-up sequence for a prospect who did not respond to the initial cold email. Include personalization for each touchpoint.

promptTemplates.title: Objection Handling Script
promptTemplates.prompt: Write sales call scripts that handle common objections for [industry/product], including responses about pricing, timing, and competitor concerns.

promptTemplates.title: Case Study Template
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a case study template showcasing [client type] results. Include challenge, solution, and metrics sections.

bestPractices: Lead with value and specific benefits rather than feature lists
Personalize emails using research about the prospect and their company
Keep emails short and scannable with one clear call to action
antiPatterns: Using generic templates without customization for each prospect
Including too many calls to action in a single email
Focusing on product features instead of customer problems

faq.question: Does this skill send emails?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates email content and templates. You must copy the output into your email platform or CRM to send.

faq.question: Can I use this for mass email campaigns?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use the templates to create campaign content. Ensure you comply with email marketing regulations like CAN-SPAM.

faq.question: Does this integrate with specific email platforms?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates text content only. Integration with email platforms requires additional tools or custom development.

faq.question: Can I customize the tone of the emails?
faq.answer: Yes, provide context about your brand voice and target audience in the prompt for customized output.

faq.question: How many emails should a follow-up sequence have?
faq.answer: A typical sequence includes 3-5 touchpoints over 2-3 weeks. The skill can generate sequences of varying lengths based on your needs.

faq.question: Can this help with A/B testing?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill generates multiple subject line options and email variations suitable for A/B testing campaigns.
